title: kalonymus yesoensis
intro: Kalonymus yesoensis, also known as the Japanese spindle tree, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Japan. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Kalonymus yesoensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various inflammatory conditions such as arthritis and eczema. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing the leaves or bark in hot water to create a tea, or by using the extracts in capsule or tincture form to utilize its medicinal properties.
